overall.description: A static scene from a Harry Potter video game depicting the Great Hall with students in wizard robes seated at long wooden tables. A single student walks across the foreground while the camera remains fixed, capturing the gothic architecture and warm interior lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic school dining hall with vaulted ceilings

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the great hall from a fixed vantage point

notable_agents.action: student in wizard robes walking from left to right across the foreground

entered.detail: high arched ceiling with dark wooden beams and stone construction
large hanging chandelier with multiple candles providing warm light
long wooden tables arranged in rows for dining
simple wooden benches paired with the dining tables
grey stone walls with dark wood paneling on the lower half
rectangular framed paintings hanging on the stone walls
elaborately carved stone structure with decorative details
polished stone flooring with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary in a gothic school dining hall with high vaulted ceilings and warm artificial lighting from an iron chandelier. Several students in wizard robes sit at long wooden tables on benches, while one student walks across the foreground from left to right. Stone walls with framed portraits and an ornate carved monument are visible to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, observant gaze within a gothic school dining hall, capturing a moment of quiet activity under warm interior lighting. It begins with a wide view of the space, where high vaulted ceilings and an iron chandelier cast a golden glow over students in wizard robes seated at long wooden tables. As a single student walks across the foreground from left to right, the camera remains fixed to emphasize the scale of the surrounding architecture. The scene then draws attention to the periphery, revealing stone walls adorned with framed portraits and an ornate carved monument to the right.
